SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-06-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:10am
Judge Pro Tem Jason Jungreis, clerk Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 525
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, ZLine Capbinet appears through attorney Chijeh Hu with Mr. Zhang. Respondents, Kurt Schwabe & Linda Frandsen appears in pro per with witness Mr. Wong. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Jungreis.

EXHA (1) Trial de novo brief by ZLine
EXHA (2) Trial de novo brief by Raymond Zhang
EXHR (A) Packet of various exhibits including photos and specs

10:07am
Evidence is retained, matter is submitted
